whatsnew: Audit-first: Free tier now ships with a curated set of checks (non-overlapping with sp_BLITZ) plus first-class sp_BLITZ CSV import — paste your existing sp_BLITZ output and see it merged with live findings on the Audit Assessment page.

Full tier unlock: Activate Full Audit in Settings to enable the complete ~700-check corpus, governance weighting, build catalogue, and SQL licensing-cost estimator. License keys are issued as 24-word BIP39 phrases for easy phone/email handoff.

Security: All Full-tier IP now ships encrypted (AES-256-GCM) in a per-customer bundle next to sqltriage.exe. Customer name binds cryptographically to the bundle (GCM AAD watermark). No phone-home; activation is fully offline.
RAG retrieval (Full + RAG tier only): rag.db is distributed separately via secure share. The app gates RAG features by license; drop the file next to sqltriage.exe to enable.
Release packaging: LICENSE.txt now ships with the installer and appears as a wizard accept page. Curation artefacts and the stray measurement_*.json files no longer leak into release builds.
Boot-order: governance-weights.json no longer required at IConfiguration time; lazy-loaded from the active bundle. Removes the v0.90.1 hard failure when the file was missing.
